summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW features: Pin Hover Preview Box with Resolve button and Auto-generated Website Thumbnails. All features working correctly. Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All new features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Pin Hover Preview - hovering over pin shows floating preview box with comment text
Resolve from Hover Box - clicking Resolve in hover preview marks pin as resolved
Auto-generated Thumbnails - creating URL project automatically generates thumbnail in background
Thumbnail Refresh Button - refresh icon visible on hover, endpoint works correctly
Dashboard displays thumbnails correctly for URL projects
Pin Positioning - pins stay anchored when scrolling (scroll tracking implemented)
Comment sidebar visible with pin list
All 27 existing backend tests still passing
3 new thumbnail generation tests added and passing
critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect dependency warnings in multiple files - not critical but should be addressed for code quality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Pin Hover Preview shows floating box with comment preview and Resolve button when hovering over pins, 2) Auto-generated thumbnails work - projects show 'Generating thumbnail...' immediately after creation, then thumbnail appears within seconds, 3) Refresh thumbnail button visible on project card hover. Test user: testuser_1770157573@example.com/password123. Two projects exist: Test Website Review (with 1 pin) and GitHub Review.

features_verified.pin_hover_preview: Working - shows floating box with comment text, author name, View Thread and Resolve buttons
features_verified.resolve_from_hover: Working - clicking Resolve in hover preview updates pin status and shows toast notification
features_verified.auto_generated_thumbnails: Working - background task generates thumbnail after URL project creation
features_verified.thumbnail_refresh_button: Working - visible on hover, calls POST /api/projects/{id}/refresh-thumbnail
features_verified.dashboard_thumbnails: Working - displays thumbnails for URL projects, shows 'Generating thumbnail...' for pending
features_verified.pin_positioning: Working - pins track scroll position and stay anchored
features_verified.comment_sidebar: Working - shows pin list and comment thread
features_verified.optimistic_ui: Working - comments appear immediately before server confirmation
